module simd_load64_lane.0.wasm
assert_return v128.load64_lane_0 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010203040506070000000000000000
assert_return v128.load64_lane_1 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000102030405060708
assert_return v128.load64_lane_0_offset_0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010203040506070000000000000000
assert_return v128.load64_lane_1_offset_1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000102030405060708
assert_return v128.load64_lane_0_align_1 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010203040506070000000000000000
assert_return v128.load64_lane_0_align_2 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010203040506070000000000000000
assert_return v128.load64_lane_0_align_4 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010203040506070000000000000000
assert_return v128.load64_lane_0_align_8 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010203040506070000000000000000
assert_return v128.load64_lane_1_align_1 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000102030405060708
assert_return v128.load64_lane_1_align_2 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000102030405060708
assert_return v128.load64_lane_1_align_4 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000102030405060708
assert_return v128.load64_lane_1_align_8 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000102030405060708
assert_invalid simd_load64_lane.1.wasm
assert_invalid simd_load64_lane.2.wasm
assert_invalid simd_load64_lane.3.wasm
